prompt: A high-fashion editorial photograph of a female model standing in an arid desert landscape with distant mountains under a soft cloudy sky. She is wearing a spectacular, structured haute couture dress made entirely of folded vintage maps, featuring sharp, origami-like geometric layers and a strapless bodice. She has dark hair swept up, striking facial features, and wears large circular earrings resembling compasses. Surrounding her in the air are exactly 7 floating elongated compass needles with clock faces in the center. The image features cinematic late afternoon lighting, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the paper dress and the dry earth. Photorealistic, surreal fashion photography.
